data.title: Meet David Bateman, the man who invested $1 billion into physical silver ahead of historic rally
data.description:
Nearly a year ago, Entrata’s founder, David Bateman, dropped nearly $1 billion on physical silver, and now he’s watching the price fly past $101 an ounce for the first time in history. In a post on X, David said that he started accumulating in October 2024, grabbing 12. 69 million ounces, which is 1. 5% of the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/david-bateman-1-billion-in-physical-silver/

data.title: 478,188 Americans Warned After Hackers Strike Government-Related Firm Handling Sensitive Personal Data
data.description:
Hackers have breached the systems of a government-related entity handling sensitive personal information, putting the data of 478,188 Americans at risk. According to a new notification filed with the Maine Attorney General’s office, the incident at Brittany N. Griffiths in Illinois happened in May of last year
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/01/24/478188-americans-warned-after-hackers-strike-government-related-firm-handling-sensitive-personal-data/

data.title: Cyberattack on Illinois Firm Exposes Personal Data of Thousands
data.description: A government-affiliated company in Illinois experienced a cyberattack in May last year, leading to the exposure of sensitive personal information of 478,188 Americans. According to NS3.AI, more than 284,000 of those affected are residents of Maine, triggering state-required breach notifications. Individuals impacted by the breach are encouraged to implement protective measures, including credit freezes and monitoring. Legal actions have been suggested as a means for potential compensation.

data.title: Trump risks $10.4 trillion investor exodus from US markets
data.description:
President Donald Trump’s aggressive stance toward Europe may be pushing away some of the biggest buyers of American stocks, even as he celebrates record market highs and predicts further gains. Trump said he expects the US stock market to double from its current record levels, which he takes credit for achieving. But there’s a problem. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-risks-10-4-trillion-investor-exodus-us/

data.title: OpenAI Introduces Age Prediction on ChatGPT to Strengthen Youth Safety
data.description:
OpenAI is introducing an age-prediction feature for ChatGPT to identify users under 18 and automatically apply enhanced safety protections. The system analyzes account signals to block sensitive content, aiming to address ongoing criticism and legal concerns over teen safety. The post OpenAI Introduces Age Prediction on ChatGPT to Strengthen Youth Safety first appeared on The Shib Daily.
source: https://news.shib.io/2026/01/24/openai-introduces-age-prediction-on-chatgpt-to-strengthen-youth-safety/

data.title: Institutions Sound Nervous: Their Capital Tells a Different Story
data.description:
Recent investor survey data from Coinbase Institutional, produced alongside Glassnode, reveals a growing gap between institutional messaging and actual portfolio behavior. While confidence has clearly softened in how institutions describe the market, their positioning suggests restraint rather than retreat.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/institutions-sound-nervous-their-capital-tells-a-different-story/

data.title: Significant Transfer of TON Tokens to Elector Contract
data.description: A substantial transfer of TON tokens has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 00:14, a total of 1,400,507.8 TON tokens were moved from an anonymous address, beginning with Uf95OR, to the TON Elector Contract.

data.title: Crypto-Friendly Policies Expected to Transform Industry Landscape
data.description: Liquid Capital founder Yi Lihua has expressed optimism about the gradual implementation of crypto-friendly policies. According to ChainCatcher, Yi highlighted the likely passage of the crypto structure bill as a significant milestone for the industry. This development marks the end of previous hindrances and ushers in a new phase of positive growth within a favorable macroeconomic environment. Yi anticipates the emergence of numerous talented founders and high-quality projects, while also removing barriers for U.S. financial institutions to engage in crypto finance. The integration of the crypto industry into the mainstream financial system is expected to accelerate.
